description: Crawl https://crawler-test.com/ to identify non-standard redirects, specifically Meta Refresh and JavaScript redirects. Export the identified Meta Refresh redirects to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/meta_refresh_audit.csv and the JavaScript redirects to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/js_redirect_audit.csv. Generate a summary report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/redirect_remediation_summary.txt listing the counts for each redirect type and providing a technical justification for their remediation, such as conversion to 301 redirects.
